name: rag-reviewer
description: Agentic PR review: hybrid RAG + code graph via MCP, review skills for Codex

interface.shortDescription: RAG + code graph PR review pipeline
interface.longDescription: Agentic pull request review using hybrid RAG search, code graph analysis, and MCP tools. Supports review-pr, solve-task, sync-tasks, performance-review, and maintainability-review skills.
